response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical expertise in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure (including MCP), cloud technologies, and data pipelines, with proven leadership in production-grade systems. However, his experience is more generalist and lacks direct evidence of staff-level AI/GenAI delivery to enterprise customers, vector databases, or RAG architectures. His recent role in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not fully aligned with the GenAI/cloud focus required.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Python (implied), and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, showing alignment with modern GenAI workflows
Strong background in scalable systems, data pipelines, and performance optimization
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in the resume
No clear evidence of staff-level leadership in AI/GenAI enterprise customer engagements
Education is in Computer Science but lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) preferred for GenAI roles

key_factors.factor: Staff-level technical leadership in enterprise contexts
